STS2CHARTEST-VOID_EYE.description: Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] at the start of combat.
STS2CHARTEST-VOID_EYE.flavor: 'How is the void giving her heat? Isn't the void cold?' - Norgna
STS2CHARTEST-VOID_EYE.title: Void Eye
STS2CHARTEST-SUN_STONE.description: Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] at the start of combat. Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] on each turn after the first one.
STS2CHARTEST-SUN_STONE.title: Sun Stone
